title: Custom Displayname
description: Rename yourself and others locally (client-side only).
body:
# Custom Displayname  

A simple client-side mod that lets you locally rename yourself and other players.  

You can also decorate names using tags like `<#ffffff><bold>Custom <#ffff00>Displayname`.  

Supported tags:  
- **bold**  
- **italic**  
- **underlined**  
- **strikethrough**  
- **obfuscated**  
- **reset**  
- **hex** (e.g., `<#ff0000>`)  

![A screenshot showing the player's name changed to 'Customized name'.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52003c86a32524e87a07d5b0058560b65911d244_0.webp)
